titleStmt.title: SII 29.115: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 115. (A.R. No. B. 560 of 1961-62.) HIREKOṬNAKALLU, MANVI TALUK, RAICHUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: It states that during the reign of Chālukya Tribhuvanamalla Sōmēśvara and when mahamaṇḍaḷēśvara Maiḷugidēvarasa of Mānuve was administering, Brahmadēvabhaṭṭa, the grandson of Tippaṇa bhaṭṭōpādhyāya made a grant of land in the presence of the mahājanas of agrahāra Koṭṭukuṇuhe for a feeding house (choultry). The gifted land was earlier purchased by the donor from Iśvaraṇṇama of Bāguḷahāra.
The record is dated śaka 1113, Virōdhikṟit, Chaitra, śu. 13, Sunday corresponding to 1191 A.D., March 10. Sunday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī Ōṁnamaḥ śivāyaḥ . namastuṁga siraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cā
ravē trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti sama
sta bhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ pa
rama bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayaṁ kuḻatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇa śrīmatribhuvanamalla sōmēśvara
dēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhi pravardhamānamācaṁdrārkka tā
raṁbaraṁ saluttamire . tatpāda padmōpajīvigaḷappa svastyānēka bhaṁgura taraṁga saṁ
ghātavīcīvijaya lavaṇābdhivaḷaya vaḷayīta vēḷāvana gaṁgāyātra tanmadhye
dēśādhīśvara māhiṣmatī puravarādhīśvaraṁ madhyadēśādhipati sahasrabāhu pratāpabhū
padaḷīpa haihaya kuḷasaṁbhava vivēka śaṁcōdbhavanatyugra narasira darpaṇa ga
ja virājamāna dānakānīna mūlasaṟeghoṣaṇaṁ nriparatna bhūṣaṇaṁ śrīmanmahā
maṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ mānuveya maiḷugidēvarasaru sukhasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ
geyuttamire . svasti yamaniyama svādhyāya dhyānadhāraṇa maunā
nuṣṭāna japasamādhiṟiṁ guṇasaṁpannarōpāta guṇāgni hōtra dvijaguru
dēvatā pūjātadbhaktaru mātādādvija kīrttiyaṁ karuṁ sakalaśāstra vi
śāradarumappa śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara nitya bhūmidānada
śrī matsarvanamasyadagrahāraṁ koṭṭukuṇuheyaśēṣa mahājanaṁgaḷa
saṁnidhānadalu sakavarṣada 1113 neya virōdhikritu saṁvatsarada caitra śuddha 13
yādivāradandu yāsadavisakadalli cikkatippaṇa bhaṭkōpādhyāyara
mammanu brahmadēva bhaṭṭaru taṁma vrittiyoḷage pādavṛttiya ca
kanabaraviyaṇnagaḷa dēvaṇaṁ yakkara makkaḷu traipudaṁṇaḷi
ge bāguḷahāṟa Īśvaraṇnamaṁgaḷa kaiyalu krayavaṁ koṇḍu pā
da vrittiya pratinidhige yiṁ pādavṛttiyaṁ koṁḍu ba
ḷi sahitavāgi dharmatakkevu satrakaṁyā mahājanaṁgaḷege
pādapūje koṭṭu pādavrittiyaṁ biṭṭaru yā mahā
janaṁgaḷu sarbbabādhā parihāravāgi koṭṭu pratipāḷisu
varu — svadattaṁ paradatta vāyōharēti vasuṁ
dharā ṣaṣṭi varṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē kri
mi .
Digital edition of SII 29.115 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
